expiration_date.description: Indicate date when the file will be not available anymore.

get.description: Return a list of known storage locations

200.description: All known storage locations were retrieved.

post.description: Create a new storage location by specifying its name. Returns the created storage location.

get.description: Run monitoring for storage locations to compute the number of files and space occupation. Optionally reset the monitoring.

post.description: Trigger the execution of periodic tasks on all storage locations.
Retry all file requests that are in an error state for the specified source and session.

200.description: File requests in error state for the given source and session were retried successfully.

post.summary: Retry file requests in error state for a source and session

delete.description: Delete a storage location and its configuration by specifying its name.

get.description: Fetch a storage location's details by specifying its name.
get.summary: Retrieve a storage location by name

put.description: Update the configuration of a storage location by providing its details.

delete.description: Delete all files referenced in the specified storage location. Optionally, use force delete to unreference files even if physical deletion fails.

200.description: All files in the storage location deleted successfully.

delete.summary: Delete all files in a storage location

get.description: Retry all file requests that are in an error state for the specified storage location and request type.

200.description: File requests in error state were retried successfully.

get.summary: Retry file requests in error state

delete.description: Delete requests of a storage location based on its name, request type, and optionally the request status.
